name: acreo
description: ZK authorization and privacy layer for AI agents. Cryptographically enforces what agents can and cannot do. Prevents unauthorized actions, strips PII, and provides tamper-proof audit trails.
author: Anba Labs

tools.name: acreo_create_identity
tools.description: Create a cryptographic identity for a user or AI agent

tools.name: acreo_delegate
tools.description: Delegate permissions from a user to an AI agent via signed credential

tools.name: acreo_prove_authorization
tools.description: Generate a ZK proof that an agent is authorized to perform an action

tools.name: acreo_verify
tools.description: Verify a ZK authorization proof before executing any agent action

tools.name: acreo_protect
tools.description: Strip PII from text before sending to AI models or external services

tools.name: acreo_prove_identity
tools.description: Generate a ZK identity proof without revealing the private key

tools.name: acreo_status
tools.description: Get Acreo Protocol status and active session stats
